name: build
description: Structured build workflow — 4 portable skills: impl-plan, review-plan, verify, architect-review.

interface.shortDescription: Plan before you build, review before you ship, verify before you claim.
interface.longDescription: Four portable skills that work standalone or chained: impl-plan creates a detailed implementation plan from the codebase; review-plan runs a skeptical senior-engineer review of the plan; verify runs tests and reports real evidence; architect-review runs a principal-architect review of completed work across 10 lenses.
